headlines.headline: NBA free agency 2026: How much all 30 teams can spend this summer
headlines.description: Which front offices boast the most spending power? Which are battling to avoid the second apron? Bobby Marks examines all 30 teams.

headlines.headline: Orlando Magic waive forward Jonathan Isaac
headlines.description: The Magic have waived forward Jonathan Isaac, which will save Orlando $6.5 million, according to ESPN's Bobby Marks.

headlines.headline: 2026 NBA buzz: Latest news, injuries, league intel, updates
headlines.description: We're tracking the latest news, rumors and buzz across the NBA, including what we're hearing ahead of free agency.

headlines.headline: Jimmy Butler shares update on ACL recovery, future with the Warriors
headlines.description: Butler, who tore his right ACL on Jan. 19, told ESPN he expects to still be "a top player" when he returns from the injury.

headlines.headline: 2026 NBA free agency: Grades for offseason signings, extensions
headlines.description: We're grading the biggest NBA free agent signings and extensions, including Austin Reaves' new deal with the Lakers.

headlines.headline: Thunder to keep Hartenstein on new 3-year deal, sources say
headlines.description: Isaiah Hartenstein intends to sign a new three-year contract worth $75 million to return to the Thunder through the 2028-29 season, sources told ESPN.

headlines.headline: Will Christian Gonzalez's extension get done before camp?
headlines.description: There is one month before training camp begins. Will the top cornerback sit out if a deal is not reached?

headlines.headline: Jets' Demario Davis spends nearly $1M annually on body recovery
headlines.description: After nearly retiring in 2016, Davis was able to prolong his career by investing in recovery and training.

headlines.headline: O.J. Simpson won't be honored among Bills legends at new stadium
headlines.description: The Bills will not honor former running back O.J. Simpson among the franchise's legends at their new stadium, the team announced.

headlines.headline: Brandon Aiyuk blames ex-agent as push to leaves 49ers continues
headlines.description: Brandon Aiyuk said in a YouTube video that his former agent has influenced the ongoing situation between him and 49ers and that general manager John Lynch recently showed up at his house.

headlines.headline: Rookie CB Johnson gearing for major role with Dolphins in '26
headlines.description: Miami didn't have the salary cap space to go after any of the top free agent cornerbacks, so it hopes Johnson can produce immediately.

headlines.headline: NFC West roundtable: Which team had the best offseason?
headlines.description: The Seahawks, Rams, 49ers and Cardinals all had offseasons to remember. Answering five questions ahead of 2026.

headlines.headline: 2026 NHL draft grades: Best, worst, most surprising picks
headlines.description: Which teams added the most value this weekend? Who whiffed badly? We grade all 32 here.

headlines.headline: 7-foot-1 Alexander Karmanov tallest player drafted in NHL
headlines.description: The San Jose Sharks selected 7-foot-1 defenseman Alexander Karmanov, making the 18-year-old the tallest player ever drafted by an NHL team.

headlines.headline: Which 2026 NHL draft picks should I have on my fantasy hockey team?
headlines.description: Which top picks from the 2026 NHL draft should you draft for next season's fantasy hockey teams?

headlines.headline: Winners, losers of the 2026 NHL draft: Rangers, Leafs, Blackhawks
headlines.description: Now that all the selections have been made, what stands out the most? Here are the picks, trades and moments we'll remember -- for better or worse.

headlines.headline: 2026 NHL draft updates: 7-round, 32-team pick tracker
headlines.description: The draft is complete. Here's a list of every selection, including detailed analysis for the top 32.

headlines.headline: Hurricanes acquire rights to John Carlson in trade with Ducks
headlines.description: The Hurricanes on Saturday acquired the rights to unrestricted free agent defenseman John Carlson in a trade with the Ducks.
